Become a Partner

We value respect, kindness, and inclusivity

Atrributes and Values

The Nurturing Roots Preschool and Daycare places a strong emphasis on providing a nurturing and safe environment for children to learn and grow. Our staff is dedicated to fostering a love of learning and encouraging children to reach their full potential.

Transparency

Trust

Integrity

Innovation

Preschool Franchise Partnership

The Nurturing Roots Franchise

Partner with The Nurturing Roots

Grow with purpose. Build with trust.

At The Nurturing Roots, we invite passionate individuals and entrepreneurs to be a part of our journey in shaping young minds. The preschool franchise model offers a meaningful opportunity to build a long-term, sustainable business while making a lasting impact on early childhood education.

With the growing demand for quality preschool education, this is an investment that not only promises stability but also creates value for your community. However, success in this space requires more than just intent—it requires the right guidance, structure, and support.

That’s where The Nurturing Roots stands apart. As your trusted partner, we bring deep expertise, a well-established curriculum, and a proven operational framework to help you build and run a successful preschool. From setup to day-to-day management, our comprehensive support system ensures you are guided at every step of your journey.

Together, we aim to create nurturing learning spaces that inspire children and empower educators—while helping you grow a rewarding and impactful venture.

Why Partner With Us?

  • Proven preschool model with strong brand identity
  • Comprehensive training and ongoing support
  • Well-researched curriculum and teaching methodology
  • Guidance in setup, operations, and marketing
  • Opportunity to build a meaningful and profitable business

Start Your Journey With Us

Question

Frequently Asked Questions

At what age does The Nurturing Roots Preschool and Daycare accept students?

The Nurturing Roots Preschool and Daycare accepts admissions from the age of 1year for Daycare and1.6 years for Preschool.

What are the hours and the schedules?

The Nurturing Roots hours and schedules are as follows:

  1. Daycare: 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM
  2. Little Explorer:
    Morning Batch 9:00 AM to 11:30 PM and Afternoon Batch 11:30 AM to 2:00 PM.
  3. Curious Cubs:
    Morning Batch 9:00 AM to 12:00 Noon and Afternoon Batch 11:00 AM to 2:00 PM
  4. Rising Star 1: 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM
  5. Rising Star 2: 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM
What is the teacher student ratio?

At Nurturing Roots Preschool and Daycare, the student to teacher ratio is 8:1.

What is The Nurturing Roots Preschool and Daycare’s learning/ teaching philosophy and curriculum?

We consider every child is different and that they also learn in different ways and at different speeds. As a result, we adopt the Coalesce Approach, a combination of the Montessori Method, Play Way Method, Project Method and Thematic Method.

What are the steps to be followed for admissions?

Please fill the enquiry form for securing admissions.
